basis: Equal-weight z-score blend of run differential and winning %, season-to-date.
mmr_basis: Dynamic layer: 14d expected-vs-actual (Elo expectancy on composite z, scale 10), upset-weighted, 7d half-life, K=0.18, clamp 0.60z; tier flips need boundary +/-0.05 for 2 consecutive runs, one step per run. Display-only starting-guess parameters; the model never reads tiers.
